notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds out sharply, pitcher Ryan Thompson to first baseman LuJames Groover.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson singles on a ground ball to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo reaches on a fielder's choice. LuJames Groover to 3rd. Ketel Marte to 2nd. LuJames Groover advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by third baseman Blaze Jordan.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Church pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Church flies out to center fielder Tommy Troy.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson flies out to left fielder Tim Tawa.
